name: nu/media-card
title: Fellows: Media Card
description: Image beside a heading and paragraph. Optionally reversed.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body
fields.default_value: Each fellow is paired with a faculty mentor and joins a small track team focused on one problem area — plugin architecture, editor UX, performance, or accessibility. No prior WordPress experience required, just solid PHP or JS fundamentals.

fields.name: image_alt
fields.label: Image alt text
fields.default_value: Fellow working at a laptop with a mentor
